_meta.description: Reads environment variables and resolves the runtime_config payload used by all downstream phases.

env_vars.name: STORE_OS_OPENAI_CREDENTIAL_NAME
env_vars.description: Name of the n8n OpenAI credential to use for LLM calls

env_vars.name: STORE_OS_SHOPIFY_CREDENTIAL_NAME
env_vars.description: Name of the n8n Shopify credential to use for data import

env_vars.name: STORE_OS_ENV
env_vars.description: Deployment environment: dev | staging | production | cloud-smoke

env_vars.name: STORE_OS_PROJECT_ROOT
env_vars.description: Absolute path to the projects root directory (self-hosted only)

env_vars.name: STORE_OS_MAX_PRODUCTS
env_vars.description: Maximum number of products to import from Shopify. Defaults to 250.

env_vars.name: STORE_OS_MAX_COLLECTIONS
env_vars.description: Maximum number of collections to import from Shopify. Defaults to 50.

runtime_config_payload.description: Resolved runtime configuration object passed to all downstream phases
runtime_config_payload.persistence: in-memory only — never written to disk

validation_errors.description: A required environment variable is absent or empty. Halts the chain.
An environment variable has a value outside its allowed enum. E.g. STORE_OS_ENV=unknown.
The named credential could not be resolved in the n8n credential store.

fatal_conditions: STORE_OS_ENV is not one of: dev, staging, production, cloud-smoke
In self-hosted mode: STORE_OS_PROJECT_ROOT is empty or path does not exist

cloud_notes.cloud_mode_detection: require('fs') is attempted — throws in n8n Cloud, setting cloudMode=true
cloud_notes.project_root: Not required in cloud mode. runtime_config.project_root will be null.
cloud_notes.env_var_access: In n8n Cloud, environment variables are accessed via $env or process.env depending on n8n version. Both are attempted.
changes_in_cloud_mode: cloud_mode flag is set to true in runtime_config
ajv_schema_path is null (no local schema files accessible)
